case_title: FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT MED GROUP VS OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,304.00 FILED BY FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT MED GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAMILY HEALTH & WELLNESS DBA MISSION MKT MED GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTUS, TROY T., ATTORNEY AT LAW $2,349.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,349.44, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF IS OWED $3304 BY MANUEL COVARUBIAS FOR CHIROPRATIC SERVICES. DEFENDANT TROY T. OTUS IS AUTHORIZED AND ORDERED TO RELEASE TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $2349.44 OF FUNDS HELD IN TRUST FOR MANUEL COVARUBIAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
